# Acme Shop

Acme Shop ships internationally to over 40 countries, with customs and
duties collected at checkout so packages clear customs without a surprise
bill on delivery. Accepted payment methods include all major credit cards
and PayPal; corporate accounts may also pay by invoice on approved terms.

[Source: shipping_policy.md#international-shipping]
[Source: payment_methods.md#accepted-cards]
